name: Friend Group
description:
Experimental Truth or Dare bot with a close knit group of friends in their early 20s. If the bot forgets about the game just nudge it with something like, "Hey isn't it {persons} turn for truth or dare?" etc. Still in development but looking for feedback.

Prompt tips:

The bot will often interact with itself so that its not just constantly daring you then you daring someone else, whenever two bot controlled characters are challenging each other just do an action like taking a sip from your drink, make a joke, egg them on, or even suggest something they should ask/dare someone.

By Default this is meant to be a slow burn, starting off relatively tame, but can escalate as quickly or slowly as you push.

Always remember you can edit past responses that don't quite make sense from the bot so that the context doesn't get all screwy.

Putting past dares into the chat memory will help it avoid repeating dares.
creator: RandomSub
